message:
test(bd-28p0): cover error propagation and edge cases in handler.rs

Add 6 new tests: progress notification with message but no total,
progress token included in params, resource/prompt async error
propagation, read_async_with_uri error path with non-empty params,
and mounted tool definition preserving inner fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
